sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: Participants A and B continue their discussion on music.
PartitionA: So what kind of music do you enjoy listening to? Any particular artists or genres?
I'm really into hip hop and R&B right now. Some of my favorite artists are Kendrick Lamar, J. Cole, and SZA. How about you? What type of music to you usually listen to?

ParticiaB: Yeah, those are all great choices. My taste in music is pretty eclectic though, I also love indie rock and pop punk. Some bands that I've been jamming to lately are Arctic Monkeys, The Strokes, and Green Day.
Oh, I can totally get down with some good old fashioned rock 'n roll! Have you heard of any new indie bands recently that you think are worth checking out?
Actually, I just discovered this up-and-coming artist called Phoebe Bridgers. She's got a really unique sound that blends folk and indiepop. Definitely worth giving a listen if you haven't already.

That sounds interesting! I actually saw her perform at a festival last summer and she was amazing live. Her lyrics are very relatable and her voice is so hauntingly beautiful. Thanks for the recommendation!
You're welcome! It's always great discovering new music and sharing recommendations with others who appreciate good tunes. By the way, what kind

Of course, I agree completely! Music truly has the power to bring people together and create memorable experiences. Speaking of which, did you happen to catch any concerts before everything went virtual due to the pandemic?

Yes, I was lucky enough to see Lizzo in concert before everything shut down. It was such an empowering experience seeing her perform live and feeling the energy of the crowd. I hope we can return to normal soon and start going to shows again.
I definitely miss going to concerts and festivals as well. Virtual events just aren't quite the same. But hopefully things will get better soon and we can start enjoying live music again.

I totally understand how you feel. Live performances add so much excitement and authenticity to the music experience. Hopefully, we won't have to wait much longer for things to go back to normal. In the meantime, let's keep our fingers crossed for some incredible virtual events and continue supporting our favorite musicians through their online platforms.

Absolutely! We should also try to discover new independent artists and support them by streaming their songs and following them on social media. There are so many talented individuals out there waiting for their big break, and we could be a part of helping them succeed in their careers. Plus, it's exciting to find a new favorite band or artist that nobody else seems to be talking about yet.

Definitely, supporting emerging talent helps keep the creative spirit alive in the industry. And you never know, maybe the artist you discover today will become a household name tomorrow. Let's stay open to exploring different genres and styles, and share our finds with each other.
